name: Support escalation policy example
answer:
Escalated support tickets receive a first response within 4 business hours.
Escalated support tickets receive a first response within 30 calendar days.
Every escalated support ticket receives a dedicated engineer.

sources.title: Support Escalation Policy
sources.content:
Escalated support tickets receive a first response within 4 business hours.
Escalated security incidents are routed to the on-call engineer.
